title: ilex subrotundifolia
intro: Ilex subrotundifolia, also known as the dwarf holly or rounded-leaved holly, is a small, evergreen shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Ilex subrotundifolia include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
